Follow these steps to import products in: Follow these steps to import products in bulk
Download the CSV template with the corre: Download the CSV template with the correct column headers and sample data
Fill in your product data following the: Fill in your product data following the template format. Category name is required and must match an existing category.
Upload your completed file and the syste: Upload your completed file and the system will create the products automatically
Products without a valid category name w: Products without a valid category name will be rejected. Make sure the category exists before importing.

No categories found! You must create at: No categories found! You must create at least one category before importing products.

If the category name does not exist, it: If the category name does not exist, it will be created automatically. You can also insert images directly in the Excel file.
